fields.name: backgroundImage
fields.label: Background Image
fields.description: Upload or select a background image (used when type is 'Still Image')

fields.name: backgroundVideo
fields.label: Background Video URL
fields.description: Path to MP4 video file in /public (e.g., /videos/bg.mp4)

fields.name: backgroundColor
fields.label: Background Color
fields.description: Hex color value (e.g., #D26D1F). Used when type is 'Solid Color'

fields.name: gradientFrom
fields.label: Gradient From
fields.description: Starting color for gradient (e.g., #D26D1F)

fields.name: gradientTo
fields.label: Gradient To
fields.description: Ending color for gradient (e.g., #F3C041)

fields.name: overlayOpacity
fields.label: Overlay Opacity
fields.description: 0 = no overlay, 100 = fully opaque. Recommended: 40-60 for readability.

fields.name: overlayColor
fields.label: Overlay Color
fields.description: Hex color for the overlay (default: #FFFDF9 to match your background)

fields.name: bio
fields.label: Bio
fields.description: Your personal bio / introduction text (About page)

fields.name: period
fields.label: Time Period
fields.description: e.g., 2024 — Present

fields.name: category
fields.label: Category
fields.description: e.g., Design, Research, Development, Collaboration

fields.name: footerHeading
fields.label: Footer Heading
fields.description: The heading shown in the footer section

fields.name: footerDescription
fields.label: Footer Description
fields.description: The paragraph text below the footer heading

fields.name: workTags
fields.label: Work Tags
fields.description: Tags available for filtering case studies on the Works page. Add/remove/reorder as needed.
